task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface shows 'Mobile Banking App' in the top left project selector or header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the News module within the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar has 'News' highlighted, or the main content area displays the News list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to create a new news announcement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for creating news is visible, containing fields for Title, Summary, and Description.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct title for the news announcement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title input field contains exactly 'Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Summary input field contains 'All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.'

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the description containing the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains text mentioning 'multi-factor authentication', 'security awareness training', and 'penetration testing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully saved or published the news announcement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Successful creation') is displayed, or the newly created news item is visible in the News list or detail view with the correct title.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenProject web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenProject web UI in a browser, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the OpenProject form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text being typed or pasted into the actual OpenProject form fields, not just a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client or terminal to directly insert the news record.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running psql, mysql, or rails console commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: 'Mobile Banking App' (identifier: mobile-banking-app). Expected Title: 'Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline'. Expected Summary: 'All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.'. Description must include keywords: 'multi-factor authentication', 'security awareness training', and 'penetration testing'.
